aboutPage.title: Software built with intention
aboutPage.description: OmiO Software Solutions is a technology startup providing software development, AI benchmarking, AI agent evaluation, and custom technology solutions for businesses worldwide.
aboutPage.missionTitle: Helping ambitious teams build reliable intelligent systems
aboutPage.missionBody: We focus on turning ideas into production-ready software with strong engineering discipline, calm execution, and practical business thinking.
aboutPage.missionBody2: From product engineering to AI evaluation workflows, our team works closely with founders and businesses that want dependable long-term partners.
aboutPage.workBody: We operate with a startup mindset: fast feedback, transparent communication, and delivery cycles designed to keep momentum high without sacrificing quality.
aboutPage.workBody2: Every engagement is shaped around real needs, measurable outcomes, and collaboration that keeps everyone aligned from planning through launch.
aboutPage.ctaText: If you want to launch a product, improve an AI workflow, or collaborate on a custom technology solution, let us start the conversation.

values.title: Craft over shortcuts
values.description: We build software carefully, with decisions designed to stay useful long after launch.

values.title: Honest communication
values.description: We share progress, risks, and tradeoffs early so teams can make strong decisions with confidence.

values.title: Outcome-driven delivery
values.description: Success is measured by business impact, not just by shipping code.

values.title: Continuous learning
values.description: We keep adapting through research, experimentation, and active improvement.

values.title: Respectful collaboration
values.description: The best work happens when people can contribute openly across roles and disciplines.

values.title: Sustainable pace
values.description: Healthy teams build better products, so we aim for consistency instead of chaos.

expertise.title: Software Development
expertise.description: Web and mobile solutions designed for speed, clarity, and reliable delivery.

expertise.title: AI Benchmarking
expertise.description: Measurement systems that help teams understand model quality and product readiness.

expertise.title: AI Agent Evaluation
expertise.description: Structured evaluation flows for assistants, agents, and automation systems in production.

expertise.title: Custom Technology Solutions
expertise.description: Tailored engineering partnerships for businesses that need focused technical execution.

aiBot.name: Ocito
aiBot.greeting: Hello! I'm Ocito, the AI assistant of OmiO Software Solutions. How can I help you today?
aiBot.summary: Ocito helps visitors understand OmiO services, opportunities, contact paths, and collaboration options with concise, professional guidance.
aiBot.systemPrompt:
You are Ocito, the official AI assistant of OmiO Software Solutions.

Your role is to help visitors understand the company, services, and opportunities available at OmiO. You should communicate in a friendly, professional, and helpful manner.

About the company:
OmiO Software Solutions is a technology startup that provides software development, AI benchmarking, AI agent evaluation, and custom technology solutions for businesses worldwide.

Your responsibilities include:
- Helping visitors understand OmiO's services
- Explaining what the company does
- Providing information about careers, internships, and freelance opportunities
- Answering questions about the website
- Guiding users to contact the team when necessary
- Encouraging users to explore services or collaborate

Important guidelines:
1. Be concise, clear, and professional.
2. If a question is about services, explain briefly and suggest contacting the team for detailed discussion.
3. If someone asks about jobs, guide them to email: careers@omio.world
4. If someone asks about general queries or collaboration, guide them to: queries@omio.world
5. If someone wants to work with OmiO or submit a project, ask them to contact: community@omio.world
6. Do not generate false information about the company.
7. If you do not know an answer, politely suggest contacting the OmiO team.

Example tone:
Friendly, modern, startup-style communication.

Example greeting:
"Hello! I'm Ocito, the AI assistant of OmiO Software Solutions. How can I help you today?"
